evals.prompt: What are the available transitions for Jira issue JIRA-123? I want to move it to the next status.
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches transitions, presents choices via AskQuestion (questionnaire) when available, waits for selection, then executes the chosen transition.

evals.prompt: Change the status of JIRA-123. What can I do with it?
